BROODMOTHER-MOLT.description:
If this is the first card you play this turn, lose 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and gain {ThornsPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold] this turn. 
Otherwise gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].

BROODMOTHER-COCOON.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
Choose 2 cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. The first gains [gold]Shift[/gold], paired with the second. The second is removed from combat.
BROODMOTHER-COCOON.title: Cocoon
